AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT_POWER.title: Class Default
AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT_POWER.descriptio: Next time you create a Function, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of current card in the first Slot.
AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT_POWER.smartDescr: Next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times you create a Function, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of current card in the first Slot.
AUTOMATON-FULL_RELEASE_POWER.title: Full Release
AUTOMATON-FULL_RELEASE_POWER.description:
At the start of your turn:
{effects}
AUTOMATON-FULL_RELEASE_POWER.smartDescri:
At the start of your turn:
{effects}
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS_POWER.title: Infinite Beams
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, gain a Minor Beam.
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Minor {Amount:plural:Beam|Beams}.
At the start of your turn, gain a Minor Beam+.
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Minor {Amount:plural:Beam|Beams}+.
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE_POWER.title: It's A Feature
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Status[/gold] card, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Status[/gold] card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY_POWER.title: Library
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain random cards with [gold]Encode[/gold], they cost [blue]0[/blue] until played.
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:plural:a|[blue]{Amount}[/blue]} random {Amount:plural:card|cards} with [gold]Encode[/gold], {Amount:plural:it|they} cost [blue]0[/blue] until played.
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT_POWER.title: Max Output
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw an additional card and add an [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:card|cards} and add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-MERGE_POWER.title: Merge
AUTOMATON-MERGE_POWER.description: The next time you [gold]Encode[/gold] a card, [gold]Encode[/gold] extra copies of it.
AUTOMATON-MERGE_POWER.smartDescription: The next time you [gold]Encode[/gold] a card, [gold]Encode[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra copies of it.
AUTOMATON-OPTIMIZE_POWER.title: Optimized
AUTOMATON-REMOVE_ERRORS_POWER.title: Remove Errors
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM_POWER.title: Sentient Form
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you draw a Function, increase all numbers on it by [blue]1[/blue] except for cost.
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you draw a Function, increase all numbers on it by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] except for cost.
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB_POWER.title: Summon Orb
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB_POWER.description: Whenever you create or play a Function, gain [gold]Block[/gold] and deal damage to a random enemy.
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you create or play a Function, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
AUTOMATON-EXHAUST_STATUSES_POWER.title: Repulse
AUTOMATON-EXHAUST_STATUSES_POWER.descrip: When you draw the first [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold] cards each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw a card.
AUTOMATON-EXHAUST_STATUSES_POWER.smartDe: When you draw the first [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold] {Amount:plural:card|cards} each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw a card.
